name: Castle Courtyard
description: Inside the walls, the courtyard is overgrown with weeds pushing through cracked flagstones.
ambient: A toppled statue lies broken in the grass.
Crows watch from the keep roof in uneasy silence.
A faint smell of old iron and wet ash hangs in the air.

interaction_rules.text: You run your fingers over the weathered stone. The carving is too worn to identify, but it feels colder than the air.
You kick at the weeds. A centipede scurries away, but nothing else changes.
